sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79609" key="pari/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρῐ´αμβ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n79609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυρρίχιος</ref> </xr> (̆ ̆), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ter.Maur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1461</biblScope></bibl>, etc. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n79609.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παριαμβίς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="III" id="n79609.2" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> a kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">harp</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
